name: Geopolitical Conflict Resolution
description: Predict global public, market, and stakeholder reaction to ceasefire, peace deal, or conflict escalation scenarios
default_requirement: Simulate global public and market reaction to this conflict development over 45 days. Model how different stakeholder groups (affected populations, allied governments, opposition factions, diaspora communities, oil/commodity markets, defense sector, media, humanitarian organizations) react as details emerge — including skepticism about enforcement, domestic political backlash, economic adjustment, and narrative shifts on social media.
system_prompt_addition: Focus on geopolitical dynamics: alliance shifts, domestic political pressure, sanctions impact, energy market volatility, humanitarian concerns, information warfare, and narrative control. Track how state actors, non-state actors, and civilian populations react differently. Pay attention to trust deficits, historical grievances, and how leaked details or spoiler actions affect public sentiment over time.
